texto: The balance-of-payments theory forgets that the volume of foreign trade is completely dependent upon prices
autor: that neither exportation nor importation can occur if there are no differences in prices to make trade profitable.
explicacao: Citação de that neither exportation nor importation can occur if there are no differences in prices to make trade profitable. sobre temas ligados a negocios. “The balance-of-payments theory forgets that the volume of foreign trade is completely dependent u…” articula negocios, ludwig-von-mises, the-theory-of-money-and-credit em registro de negocios, com relevância para contextos como termino e the-theory-of-money-and-credit.
